title: Document
description: A document to be included in an envelope. Documents can be provided as base64-encoded content or by reference.

documentId.description: A unique identifier for the document within the envelope, assigned by the sender. Must be unique within the envelope.

fileExtension.description: The file extension of the document. DocuSign uses this to determine the correct content type.

documentBase64.description: The base64-encoded content of the document.

remoteUrl.description: URL from which to retrieve the document content.

order.description: The order of the document in the envelope.

pages.description: The number of pages in the document.

includeInDownload.description: Whether to include this document in downloads.

transformPdfFields.description: When true, DocuSign transforms PDF form fields into DocuSign tabs.
